basicInfo.name: Nightmare Spike
basicInfo.flavor: Spike is a self-made tyrant with plans to immerse the world in the bitter cold. The only thing that could stop Spike would be thawing his frozen heart.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Increases Damage: To 50% of Physical Attack plus 12% of the caster's Max HP.
 - Single Ally
 - Grants 1 Debuff Removal(s) upon using a basic attack 2 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 50% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Frozen Strike
Skill 1.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 65% of Physical Attack plus 15% of the caster's Max HP 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Freeze. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Enemies in Row w/ Main Target
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 195% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Icequake
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 32% of Physical Attack plus 8% of the caster's Max HP 2 time(s).
 - Each attack has a 100% chance to inflict Freeze. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 32% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Heart of Ice
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Max HP-Based Attack Boost. [Always Active]
 - Grants Effect Hit Rate Boost. [Always Active]
 - All Allies
 - Grants Effect Resist Boost. [Always Active]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Effect Hit Rate Boost to 40%.

profile.story:
Spike was child born to Gelidus, the hero of humanity, and Lania, the queen of ice spirits.
Lania originally entrusted her child to the elves, hoping that Spike would flourish in a more human environment.
But a child between a human and an ice spirit was bound to have many, many complications.
Sensing that her young child would gradually wither away without drastic intervention, Queen Lania brought him back to her castle and saved him with a powerful spell that reversed his fate.
Afterwards, he grew up in the castle with no company other than the ice spirits that catered to his every whim.
The queen planned on abdicating the throne in favor of her young son. However, the throne came many duties, including to forever stand vigil for the ice dragons that fought and perished on behalf of the elves during the ancient war.
Maintaining an eternal vigil was no easy feat. Any kind of emotion, no matter how slight, would eventually cause madness and great pain to the person standing vigil. Thus, Queen Lania decided to prevent Spike from feeling love for another and sealed away her son's memories and emotions using a special red flower.
Despite the Queen's best efforts, Spike's emotions and memories started returning to him after meeting Evan and the crew. Spike, now a young man, grows more and more like his hot-blooded father every day.
